step_3.reaction_time: stirred at 900 rpm for 20 min, centrifuged at 5000 rpm for 5 min, vacuum-dried at 80°C overnight

step_4.reaction_time: stirred at 800 rpm for 12 h, ultrasonicated 25 min, stirred with dopamine for 6 h, centrifuged, vacuum-dried at 80°C for 6 h, annealed at 900°C for 1 h under Ar

double_atom_catalyst_active_site.loading: not specified in synthesis section (electrode loading: 0.1 mg/cm² in flow cell, 200 μg on 1×1 cm² CC in H-cell)
